name: world_writer_producer
notes: Single-tick slice of the producer FSM. state=PTick(3) => next_n=3 (match PTick(k)=>k), world_next.n=3, state_next=PTick(2) (k=3>1 => PTick(k-1)), effects=[] (PEnd arm not taken). world.n is read-free for the producer's next_n computation; pinned to 0 for determinism. Cross-FSM wake propagation and same-tick writer->reader visibility are multi-step scheduler properties NOT captured by this single-tick slice (see README contract TODOs).
